endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.OperationsManagement/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available OperationsManagement Rest API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the ManagementAssociations list for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the ManagementConfigurations list for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the solution list for the subscription
endpoints.description: Retrieves the solution list. It will retrieve both first party and third party solutions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Retrieve ManagementConfiguration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEMENTCONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real managementconfigurationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create/Update ManagementConfiguration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEMENTCONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real managementconfigurationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the ManagementConfiguration
endpoints.description: Deletes the ManagementConfiguration in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEMENTCONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real managementconfigurationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the solution list for the subscription
endpoints.description: Retrieves the solution list. It will retrieve both first party and third party solutions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Retrieve solution.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOLUTIONNAME}} with a real solutionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create/Update Solution.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOLUTIONNAME}} with a real solutionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the solution
endpoints.description: Deletes the solution in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOLUTIONNAME}} with a real solutionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Patch a Solution.
endpoints.description: Patch a Solution. Only updating tags supported.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOLUTIONNAME}} with a real solutionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Retrieve ManagementAssociation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTASSOCIATIONNAME}} with a real managementassociationname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create/Update ManagementAssociation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTASSOCIATIONNAME}} with a real managementassociationname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the ManagementAssociation
endpoints.description: Deletes the ManagementAssociation in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTASSOCIATIONNAME}} with a real managementassociationname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
